title: A Judge Said Nitrogen Execution Is Legal. The Man Dies June 11.
script: A federal judge ruled last week that Alabama's nitrogen gas execution method is constitutional — even though the court found it causes the most severe form of breathing discomfort for 1 to 3 minutes. The ruling came after the first-ever bench trial to examine the method's legality. Death row inmate Jeffery Lee, scheduled for execution June 11, will appeal. 8 men have now been executed by nitrogen in Alabama and Louisiana.
